DocumentationPage.title: REPUTEXA documentation
DocumentationPage.subtitle: Getting started and integration guide — aligned with how the platform actually works.

onboardingSteps.title: Create your account
onboardingSteps.description: Enter your business details: name, type, address, WhatsApp number, and email. A verification code is sent immediately.
onboardingSteps.detail: Cloudflare Turnstile protects signup from bots. Phone numbers must be in international format (e.g. +33612345678).

onboardingSteps.title: Verify your email
onboardingSteps.description: Open the message and enter the 6-digit code on the verification page. The code is valid for 15 minutes.
onboardingSteps.detail: If you do not see the email, check spam. You can request a new code from /verify.

onboardingSteps.title: Connect Google Business Profile
onboardingSteps.description: Dashboard → Settings → Platforms → “Connect Google”. Complete Google OAuth and grant listing management. Reviews sync automatically.
onboardingSteps.detail: REPUTEXA only requests business.manage. No access to your personal Google account is required.

onboardingSteps.title: Configure your AI DNA
onboardingSteps.description: Settings → AI DNA: choose tone (professional, warm, luxury, casual), reply length, and custom instructions. The AI preview updates live.
onboardingSteps.detail: On ZENITH, Triple Judge produces three variants (empathy, storytelling, expertise) and picks the best one.

onboardingSteps.title: Enable WhatsApp alerts
onboardingSteps.description: Settings → Notifications: add your WhatsApp number and the alert threshold (e.g. reviews ≤ 3★). Negative reviews arrive with the suggested AI reply.
onboardingSteps.detail: Available on PULSE and ZENITH. Alerts use Twilio with buttons to approve or edit replies from WhatsApp.

DocumentationPage.flowIntro: Whenever a negative review is detected, REPUTEXA runs this pipeline automatically — no manual step on your side.

whatsappFlow.detail: A customer posts ≤3★ on Google, Facebook, or Trustpilot.
The AI scores toxicity (hate, spam, conflict of interest, doxxing) and computes authenticity.
A contextual reply is generated following your AI DNA.
You get the review summary plus the suggested reply with Approve / Edit actions.
Approved replies go live after a 2–7h delay. Shield Center can prepare a dispute pack if the review looks fraudulent.

DocumentationPage.platformsFootnote: Google connections only use business.manage — no access to your personal Google account.
DocumentationPage.posIntro: REPUTEXA issues an inbound API key (<rtx>rtx_live_…</rtx>) in your Settings. Your POS (Square, SumUp) or Zapier/Make can POST visit data so REPUTEXA triggers AI Capture — a WhatsApp message 30 minutes after the visit inviting the customer to leave a review.
DocumentationPage.posNote: This key is for inbound webhooks (data into REPUTEXA). It is not used to read reviews or analytics from an external API.
practiceTips: Configure AI DNA before the first reviews land so suggestions are calibrated immediately.
Enable WhatsApp alerts on a phone you monitor — it is the fastest channel for urgent reviews.
For POS webhooks, send visit data within 10 minutes after checkout; the 30-minute AI Capture timer starts when we receive the payload.
Never publish your rtx_live_ key. It is tied to billing for AI Capture usage.
Shield Center runs on every review automatically — use the Alerts dashboard for critical cases.
If a WhatsApp suggestion is wrong, tap Edit — corrections train future suggestions.
DocumentationPage.ctaSubtitle: Full ZENITH access for 14 days with no card. Your first AI reply is generated in under a minute after Google connects.
